name: Toin Corporation
summary: Toin Corporation manufactures and sells paper and plastic packaging products for food, confectionary, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals markets. The company also offers packaging materials, and paper and resin packages; label products, including pressure-sensitive and glue, POP, and delayed labels; and leaflets/package inserts for pharmaceuticals and cosmetics. In addition, it provides glue, adhesive coating, and functional painting products for smartphones, semiconductors, storage media, building materials, etc. Further, the company imports and exports packaging products and raw materials; provides contract packaging services for quasi-pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, and food products; offers advertising tools, such as paper display kits; and provides pulp mold, plastic bottles, and soft and blister packaging. Toin Corporation was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
